prompt: {"type":"four-panel anime comic page","style":"cute fantasy manga illustration, polished gpt-image-2 anime rendering, vibrant colors, clean linework, soft painterly shading, whimsical magical atmosphere","page":{"background":"white page with black panel borders","title":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"月のしるしの大冒険\"}","title_position":"top center","decorations":["small gold sparkles around title","crescent moon icon to the right of title"],"panel_count":4,"reading_direction":"top to bottom"},"character":{"appearance":"young anime girl adventurer with very long wavy silver hair, pale skin, large expressive eyes, slim build","outfit":["black-and-white fantasy dress with frilled trim","crescent moon hair ornament","crescent moon choker","off-shoulder sleeves","brown leather backpack","dark thigh-high stockings"],"theme":"moon motif throughout costume and props"},"panels":[{"position":"top","scene":"sunny mountain trail and meadow under a blue sky with clouds, forest on the right, winding path into the distance, wooden signpost on the left","action":"the girl stands holding and reading an old treasure map, facing forward","props":["aged map","wooden signpost","backpack"],"text":{"sign":"冒険のはじまり","speech":"{argument name=\"panel 1 speech\" default=\"地図を発見！今日は大冒険だ！\"}"}},{"position":"upper-middle","scene":"lush jungle-like ruins entrance with a dark cave opening framed by old stone pillars carved with crescent symbols and covered in vines","action":"rear three-quarter view of the girl approaching carefully while reading the map","props":["map","ruined cave entrance","dense plants"],"text":{"speech":"{argument name=\"panel 2 speech\" default=\"この先にお宝があるはず…！\"}","sound_effect":"ガサガサ"}},{"position":"lower-middle","scene":"inside the cave ruins, dimly lit, stone altar or puzzle table in the center","action":"the girl kneels beside a lit lantern and reaches toward a puzzle mechanism instead of a nearby keyhole, while a round black cat-like mascot watches","props":["lantern emitting warm light","stone puzzle slab with engraved circular symbol","small golden key on the table","black cat creature with crescent moon mark and bead collar"],"text":{"speech":"{argument name=\"panel 3 speech\" default=\"カギじゃなくて、仕掛けを解けばいいんだ！\"}","sound_effect":"ピカッ"}},{"position":"bottom","scene":"treasure chamber with crystals embedded in the cave walls and floating sparkles","action":"the girl smiles brightly with eyes closed beside an opened treasure chest, holding up a paper invitation card","props":["open wooden treasure chest with crescent moon emblem","glowing compass inside the chest","paper card reading つぎの冒険へ","blue and purple crystals"],"text":{"speech":"{argument name=\"panel 4 speech\" default=\"宝物は…次の冒険への招待状！\"}","tag":"つづく？"}}]}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"四格动漫漫画页面","style":"可爱的奇幻漫画插图，精致的 gpt-image-2 动漫渲染，色彩鲜艳，线条清晰，柔和的绘画式阴影，奇幻的魔法氛围","page":{"background":"白色页面，黑色边框","title":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"月之印记大冒险\"}","title_position":"顶部居中","decorations":["标题周围有金色小火花","标题右侧有新月图标"],"panel_count":4,"reading_direction":"从上到下"},"character":{"appearance":"年轻的动漫少女冒险家，留着长长的波浪形银发，皮肤白皙，大而有神的眼睛，身材苗条","outfit":["带有荷叶边装饰的黑白奇幻连衣裙","新月发饰","新月项圈","露肩袖","棕色皮质背包","深色过膝袜"],"theme":"服装和道具中贯穿月亮主题"},"panels":[{"position":"顶部","scene":"蓝天白云下的阳光山间小径和草地，右侧是森林，蜿蜒的小路通向远方，左侧有一个木制路标","action":"少女站在那里，拿着并阅读一张古老的藏宝图，面向前方","props":["古老的地图","木制路标","背包"],"text":{"sign":"冒险的开始","speech":"{argument name=\"panel 1 speech\" default=\"发现地图了！今天是大冒险！\"}"}},{"position":"中上","scene":"郁郁葱葱的丛林遗迹入口，黑暗的洞穴口由刻有新月符号并覆盖着藤蔓的古老石柱构成","action":"少女从后方四分之三视角小心翼翼地靠近，同时阅读着地图","props":["地图","废弃的洞穴入口","茂密的植物"],"text":{"speech":"{argument name=\"panel 2 speech\" default=\"宝藏应该就在前面……！\"}","sound_effect":"沙沙声"}},{"position":"中下","scene":"洞穴遗迹内部，光线昏暗，中央有一个石祭坛或解谜台","action":"少女跪在点亮的灯笼旁，伸手去触碰一个解谜装置，而不是旁边的锁孔，一只圆滚滚的黑色猫咪吉祥物在旁边注视着","props":["发出温暖光芒的灯笼","刻有圆形符号的石制解谜板","桌上的小金钥匙","带有新月标记和珠子项圈的黑猫生物"],"text":{"speech":"{argument name=\"panel 3 speech\" default=\"不是钥匙，而是要解开机关！\"}","sound_effect":"闪光"}},{"position":"底部","scene":"宝藏室，洞穴墙壁上镶嵌着水晶，周围漂浮着火花","action":"少女闭着眼睛，在打开的宝箱旁灿烂地微笑，举起一张纸质邀请函","props":["带有新月徽章的打开的木制宝箱","宝箱内发光的指南针","写着“通往下一场冒险”的纸卡","蓝色和紫色的水晶"],"text":{"speech":"{argument name=\"panel 4 speech\" default=\"宝藏是……通往下一场冒险的邀请函！\"}","tag":"未完待续？"}}]}

breakdown.creativeCore: Moon Mark 冒险漫画页面：一个四格奇幻动漫漫画页面，展示了一位银发月亮主题少女发现地图、解开洞穴谜题并找到通往下一场冒险的魔法邀请函的过程。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
